data.title: Wati.io Tutorial: Automate WhatsApp Sales Step-by-Step
data.excerpt: Learn how to set up Wati.io in minutes: build WhatsApp chatbots, send broadcasts & close more deals. Follow this step-by-step guide now.

$media.alt: Wati.io Tutorial: Automate WhatsApp Sales Step-by-Step

children.text: *Disclosure: Some links in this post are affiliate links. I may earn a commission if you sign up through them, at no extra cost to you.*
I've tested dozens of messaging tools. Most feel clunky, over-engineered, or charge you for features you'll never touch. Wati.io broke that pattern for me from day one.

If you run an e-commerce store, a service business, or a marketing team and your customers live on WhatsApp, this guide walks you through every step to get Wati up and running. By the end, you'll have automated replies, scheduled broadcasts, and a CRM that actually tracks every conversation. No developer needed.
Let's dive in.
What Is Wati.io and Why Should You Care?
Wati.io is the
official WhatsApp Business API platform

built for teams that want to sell, support, and engage customers where they already spend their time. Think of it as the bridge between your business tools and the 2+ billion people using WhatsApp daily.
Here's what you get out of the box:
A no-code chatbot builder
that uses a drag-and-drop flow editor.
Broadcast messaging
to send promotions, updates, and alerts to segmented contact lists.
A built-in CRM
so every WhatsApp conversation is organized by contact, tag, and status.
Shared team inbox
where multiple agents handle chats without stepping on each other.
Deep integrations
with Shopify, WooCommerce, HubSpot, Google Sheets, and Zapier.
Meta verified Wati as an official Business Solution Provider. That means your number stays safe from bans, you get green-badge verification, and API access is handled for you.
Try Wati.io free here
Step 1: Create Your Wati Account
Head to
wati.io
and click "Start Free Trial." No credit card required.
You'll enter:
1. Your business name.
2. Your email address.
3. A phone number to connect (you can use an existing WhatsApp number or get a new one).

Wati walks you through Meta Business verification inside the dashboard. If you already have a Meta Business account, this takes under 10 minutes. If not, Wati provides a clear checklist—business name, website, proof of address—and you'll typically get approved within 24-48 hours.
Pro tip:
Have your Meta Business Manager open in another tab. Copy-paste your Business ID directly into Wati to speed things up.
Step 2: Connect Your WhatsApp Number
Once verified, you'll land on the Wati dashboard. Navigate to
Settings > WhatsApp Numbers
and follow the prompts:
Enter the phone number you want to use.
Wati sends a verification code via SMS or call.
Enter the code. Done.
Your number now runs through the official WhatsApp Business API. You keep your existing chats, contacts, and profile. Nothing gets wiped.
If you want the green checkmark badge, you can request it directly from the dashboard. Wati handles the submission to Meta.
Step 3: Build Your First Chatbot (No Code Required)
This is where Wati earns its reputation. Click
Chatbot > Create New Flow
and you'll see a visual editor that looks like a mind-mapping tool.
Here's a simple flow I built in 15 minutes:
Trigger:
Customer sends "Hi" or any message.
Reply:
"Hey! Welcome to [Brand]. What can I help you with?"
Buttons:
"Browse Products" | "Track My Order" | "Talk to a Human"
If "Browse Products"
→ send a product catalog with images and prices.
If "Track My Order"
→ ask for order number, pull data from Shopify via integration, reply with status.
If "Talk to a Human"
→ assign the chat to an available agent in the shared inbox.
Every branch is a visual node you drag, connect, and edit. You can add:
Conditional logic
(if customer tag = VIP, offer a discount).
API calls
to pull real-time data from your backend.
Delays
to simulate natural conversation pacing.
Media attachments
—images, PDFs, videos, location pins.
The chatbot handles repetitive questions 24/7 while your team focuses on complex conversations.
Explore Wati's full feature set here
Step 4: Send Your First Broadcast
Got a sale coming up? New product drop? Wati's broadcast feature lets you message thousands of contacts at once—without getting flagged.
Go to
Broadcast > New Campaign
Name your campaign
(internal use only).
Select contacts
by tag, list, or filter (e.g., "Purchased in last 30 days").
Choose a template
or write a new message. WhatsApp requires pre-approved templates for outbound messages, and Wati submits these for you automatically.
Personalize
with variables: {first_name}, {order_id}, {coupon_code}.
Schedule
for a specific date and time, or send immediately.
Track results
in the analytics panel: delivered, read, clicked, replied.
One e-commerce owner I spoke with replaced her entire email newsletter workflow with Wati broadcasts. Open rates went from 18% to 89%. That's not a typo. WhatsApp messages get read.
If you want to learn more about
use cases like this
, we have a full breakdown on TonyCiencia.
Key Features That Make Wati Stand Out
Wati packs a lot more than chatbots and broadcasts. Here's what impressed me most:
Shared Team Inbox
Every incoming WhatsApp message lands in one unified inbox. Agents pick up conversations, leave internal notes, and transfer chats with full context. It's like a helpdesk, but native to WhatsApp.
Smart Automation Rules

Set rules like: "If a customer hasn't replied in 24 hours, send a follow-up." Or: "If a message contains 'refund,' tag the contact as 'Priority' and alert the manager." These rules run in the background, keeping conversations moving without manual effort.
Deep E-commerce Integrations
Wati connects with Shopify and WooCommerce so your chatbot can:
Pull product catalogs directly into chat.
Send order confirmations and shipping updates.
Recover abandoned carts with automated reminders.
You can also pipe data to Google Sheets, trigger workflows in Zapier, or sync contacts with HubSpot. If you already use
n8n for automation
, Wati has a native node that makes complex workflows dead simple.
Analytics Dashboard
See message delivery rates, response times, agent performance, and conversation volume—all in one view. Export reports for stakeholders or use them to optimize your chatbot flows.
Multi-Agent Support
Invite your entire team. Assign roles. Set business hours. Wati scales from a solo founder to a 50-person support department without missing a beat.
Still deciding? Here's a detailed guide on
why teams choose Wati over alternatives
Who Is Wati.io Ideal For?
Wati isn't trying to be everything for everyone. It's laser-focused on businesses that communicate with customers via WhatsApp. Here's who benefits the most:
E-commerce stores
(Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento) that want automated order updates, cart recovery, and product browsing inside WhatsApp.
Service businesses
(clinics, salons, agencies) that need appointment booking, reminders, and follow-ups on autopilot.
Marketing teams
running WhatsApp campaigns alongside email and SMS, looking for higher engagement rates.
Customer support teams
that want a shared inbox, conversation history, and smart routing without paying Zendesk-level prices.
Solopreneurs and small teams
who need enterprise-grade WhatsApp automation without enterprise-grade complexity.
If your customers use WhatsApp—and globally, that's most of them—Wati meets them where they already are.
Start your free trial
and see the difference in your first week.
Step 5: Connect Integrations and Scale
Wati plays well with the tools you already use. Here's how to connect them:
Shopify:
Go to Integrations > Shopify, paste your store URL, and authorize. Wati syncs your product catalog and order data instantly.
Google Sheets:
Connect a spreadsheet to log every new lead, every conversation, or every order update. Great for quick reporting.
Zapier / n8n:
Trigger Wati messages from any app, or push Wati data to your CRM, project management tool, or Slack.
HubSpot:
Sync contacts bi-directionally. WhatsApp conversations appear in the HubSpot contact timeline alongside email and calls.
Webhooks:
For custom setups, Wati exposes webhooks that send real-time data to your own backend.
The integration setup takes minutes, not hours. And because Wati handles the API layer, you never touch raw endpoints or authentication tokens.
Step 6: Monitor, Optimize, Repeat
After your first week, open the analytics dashboard and look at:
Read rates:
Are people opening your broadcasts? If not, test different send times.
Response rates:
Are customers replying to your chatbot? If not, simplify your flows or add more button options.
Resolution time:
How fast are agents closing conversations? Use automation rules to handle the easy stuff and free up agent time.
Opt-out rates:
If people are blocking your number, you're sending too many messages or irrelevant content. Dial it back.
Wati's
tips and best practices guide
covers advanced optimization strategies. I recommend reading it after your first 100 conversations.
Quick FAQ Before You Start
Do I need a developer to use Wati?
No. Wati's chatbot builder, broadcast tools, and integrations are all no-code. If you can use a spreadsheet, you can use Wati.
Will my existing WhatsApp number work?
Yes. You can migrate your current number to the Business API. Existing chats stay intact.
Is there a free trial?
Yes. Wati offers a free trial with no credit card required.
Start it here

children.text: How long does it take to set up Wati.io?

Most users complete the initial setup—account creation, number connection, and Meta verification—within 30 minutes to 48 hours, depending on whether you already have a verified Meta Business account. Your first chatbot flow can be live the same day.
Can I use Wati.io with my existing WhatsApp number?
Yes. Wati supports migrating your current WhatsApp number to the official Business API. Your existing chats and contacts are preserved. The process is guided step-by-step inside the dashboard.
Does Wati.io support multiple agents on the same WhatsApp number?
Absolutely. Wati's shared team inbox lets multiple agents handle conversations simultaneously from the same number. You can assign roles, set business hours, and track individual agent performance.
